sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 9.21 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.9)

statement.latex: Let$P$be a maximal parabolic subgroup of the smallest index in a finite group$G$of Lie type$E_6$,$E_7$,$E_8$, or$^2E_6$and let$X$be a subgroup such that$PX=G$. Is it true that$X=G$? { V.\,D.\,Mazurov} Yes, it is true (mod CFSG) (C.\,Hering, M.\,W.\,Liebeck, J.\,Saxl, J.~Algebra, { 106}, no.\,2 (1987), 517--527).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
